metadata.description: Cross-host adversarial review for coding workflows. Routes review to whichever agent is NOT the host — Codex if you're in Claude Code, Claude Opus if you're in Codex.

plugins.name: adversarial-review
plugins.description: Cross-host adversarial review. Detects host (Claude Code vs Codex) and routes review to the partner agent. Fallback cascade: external partner → Gemini → degraded host-self with explicit warning.
